headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Wednesday?
summary: Curious about the market action on Wednesday? Dive into the US markets to explore the gap up and gap down stocks in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: Morgan Stanley favors Charles River Over IQVIA in CRO sector reset
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley upgraded contract research organization (CRO) provider Charles River Laboratories while downgrading IQVIA, arguing that improving biotech funding and portfolio changes create a more attractive risk-reward profile for Charles River, while longer-term uncertainty tied to artificial intelligence and pharma insourcing weighs on IQVIA.

headline: IQVIA (IQV): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the last six months, IQVIA’s shares have sunk to $177.52, producing a disappointing 19.8% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 12.4% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Delta Air Lines To Rally Around 12%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
summary: Top Wall Street analysts changed outlook on top names. Baird raised prices for Ryder System and J B Hunt, Needham for Glaukos, B of A for CSX, Morgan Stanley for Charles River, and Bernstein for Delta Air.

headline: Morgan Stanley Downgrades IQVIA Holdings to Equal-Weight, Lowers Price Target to $200
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Kallum Titchmarsh   downgrades IQVIA Holdings (NYSE:IQV) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $225 to $200.
